reviews.review_msg: Overall, Nilsson is a great teacher. He's attentive, respectful, and constant in the face of adversity. . . kind of like Griselda, actually. Hm. He does tend to ask questions a lot that are extremely obvious and it's almost tiresome to raise your  hand and answer them. Sometimes I wished for a bit more, more stimulation, deeper analysis in class.

While I didn't care for the content of the course all too much, as a professor, he did as much as anyone could to make it interesting. I especially felt that he was able to make the synchronous sessions very welcoming and I felt comfortable speaking. However, he is a tough marker and in my opinion, some of his ideas were a bit vague. Solid prof!
